channel.title: Tech Insights
channel.description: Daily curated news on AI, developer tools, and the tech industry

item.title: Mapa de Ciberseguridad en AWS: Guía Completa de Servicios
item.description: Aprender seguridad en AWS puede ser abrumador. Entras a la consola y ves una lista interminable de nombres que parecen sacados de una película de ciencia ficción. Pero si los agrupamos por su...

item.title: ProGate: A 3-Tier React Server Component Pattern for SaaS Subscriptions
item.description: A small Server-Component pattern that wraps tab content with a license-tier gate. Replaces a 24-line if/if/return block we had duplicated across nine pages with a single 100-line component. Here...

item.title: Chapter 10: Multi-Head Attention and the MLP Block
item.description: What You'll Build Multi-head attention (running several attention computations in parallel, each on its own slice of the per-token embedding vector) and the MLP block (a two-layer feed-forward...

item.title: Easily benchmark all your app's endpoints at once
item.description: Most "load tests" in real codebases are a curl pasted into a Slack thread. Someone runs it before a release, eyeballs the latency, and we ship. There's nothing version-controlled, nothing...

item.title: Agents are building their own UIs now. Here's when that's worth doing.
item.description: This is a submission for the Google Cloud NEXT Writing Challenge During the developer keynote at Google Cloud NEXT '26, a GDE demoed FinnishIt: an AI-powered Finnish language tutor built on the...

item.title: Manage Your Auth0 Tenants Faster with the Gemini CLI Extension
item.description: Stop switching between your browser and terminal to manage identity. In this video, I'll show you how to integrate the Auth0 MCP Server directly into your Gemini CLI. Learn how to leverage AI to...

item.title: How To "Gaslight" A Binary
item.description: Here is a very simple C code: int main() { uid_t uid = getuid(); struct passwd *pw = getpwuid(uid); printf("uid: %d, user: %s\n", uid, pw->pw_name); return 0; } It simply prints your identity in...

item.title: Your AI Agent Isn't Stupid, Your Vector Database Math Is
item.description: Hey DEV community, CallmeMiho here. I’ve been auditing AI architectures all week, and I keep seeing developers blaming their LLMs for "hallucinations" when the model isn't the problem at all. Your...

item.title: Privacy-first mind mapping app. Part 6: Maintainability and Coding Rules
item.description: This is the chapter where I admit something simple: clean code talks are nice, but products are built in history, not in slides. When MindMapVault was small, I could hold most of it in my head....

item.title: Google gains 25M subscriptions in Q1, driven by YouTube and Google One
item.description: Google added 25M paid subscriptions in Q1, reaching 350M total, as YouTube and Google One grow.

item.title: Why I built a CLI tool to kill my own ideas
item.description: We’ve all been there. You get a "brilliant" idea at 11 PM, and by midnight, you’re already git init-ing. You spend the next three weekends wrestling with state management, CSS, and deployment...

item.title: Emergency First Responders Say Waymos Are Getting Worse
item.description: “I believe the technology was deployed too quickly in too vast amounts, with hundreds of vehicles, when it wasn’t really ready,” one police official told federal regulators last month.

item.title: Microsoft reports sinking Xbox revenue as its cloud business climbs
item.description: Microsoft's Xbox hardware revenue continues to tumble, with the company revealing a 33 percent decline as part of its earnings report released on Wednesday. Even though the rest of Microsoft's...

item.title: Taylor Swift Wants to Trademark Her Likeness. These TikTok Deepfake Ads Show Why
item.description: Researchers show scammers are using AI-manipulated footage of celebrity interviews to trick users into sharing their personal data.

item.title: Google Search queries hit an ‘all time high’ last quarter
item.description: Google Search queries hit an "all time high" in the first quarter of 2026, according to a statement from CEO Sundar Pichai published as part of Alphabet's earnings on Wednesday. "Our AI...

item.title: Is AI video just a prequel? Runway’s CEO thinks world models are next
item.description: AI-generated video has gone from novelty to creative tool almost overnight, and Runway has a front row seat to the shift. The New York-based company has raised close to $860 million at a $5.3...

item.title: Parallel Web Systems hits $2B valuation five months after its last big raise
item.description: The AI agent-tool startup founded by former Twitter CEO Parag Agrawal has raised $100 million, led by Sequoia, months after raising a previous $100 million.

item.title: All the evidence unveiled so far in Musk v. Altman
item.description: The Musk v. Altman trial is underway, and that means exhibits, or the evidence to be presented in court, are being revealed piece by piece. So far, email exchanges, photos, and corporate documents...

item.title: Ubuntu’s AI plans have Linux users looking for a ‘kill switch’
item.description: Canonical's plan to add AI features to Ubuntu has some users asking for "a version of Ubuntu that does not include these features," while others say they'll stick with older versions of the Linux...

item.title: Sanctioned Chinese AI Firm SenseTime Releases Image Model Built for Speed
item.description: With US restrictions limiting its access to advanced tech, SenseTime is doubling down on open source with a new model optimized to run on Chinese-made chips.

item.title: AI evals are becoming the new compute bottleneck
Google Photos uses AI to make the iconic closet from ‘Clueless’ a reality
item.description: Google says the new feature will leverage AI technology to automatically create a copy of your wardrobe that's based on the pieces of clothing appearing in your Google Photos library.

item.title: More Gemini features are coming to Google TV
item.description: Google TV just got more Gemini features, including the ability to transform photos and videos with tools Nano Banana and Veo.

item.title: SAP-Related npm Packages Compromised in Credential-Stealing Supply Chain Attack
item.description: Cybersecurity researchers are sounding the alarm about a new supply chain attack campaign targeting SAP-related npm Packages with credential-stealing malware. According to reports from Aikido...

item.title: Motorola just revealed the Razr Fold’s price and hoo boy
item.description: 2026 is shaping up to be a tough year to launch a high-end phone. The memory crisis has phone prices rising across the board, so an already expensive phone risks becoming a much too expensive...

item.title: The new Razr Ultra is still the best-looking phone out there
item.description: Look, you're not going to find much new on the 2026 version of the Motorola Razr Ultra. There's a new main camera sensor, a slightly bigger battery, and a higher price: $1,499, up from $1,299. But...

item.title: The Moto Razr and Razr Plus are victims of shrinkflation
item.description: The memory crisis claims another couple of victims. Motorola's midtier and entry-level flip phones cost $100 more than their predecessors, and have few upgrades to show for it. The 2026 Razr Plus...

item.title: Google Photos launches an AI try-on feature for clothes you already have
item.description: Google Photos is launching a new AI-powered feature you can use to virtually try on clothes you already have. Using the photos in your gallery, Google will create a virtual "wardrobe," allowing...

item.title: Microsoft is giving its Xbox employees an Xbox email address
item.description: Xbox CEO Asha Sharma wants everyone to know: "We are Xbox." Just last week, she scrapped Microsoft Gaming as the name of Microsoft's gaming division in favor of simply Xbox. Now, to reinforce that...

item.title: Live updates from Elon Musk and Sam Altman’s court battle over the future of OpenAI
item.description: Sam Altman and Elon Musk are facing off in a high-stakes trial that could alter the future of OpenAI and its most well-known product, ChatGPT. In 2024, Musk filed a lawsuit accusing OpenAI of...
